metadata.name: Run a Poll on Social Media

description: To engage the audience around a current event, a social media editor decides to run a poll.

nodes.task_description: Formulate a simple, clear question related to a current news story.

expected_outcome.value: A relevant poll question is drafted.

nodes.task_description: Provide 2-4 distinct and balanced answer options.

expected_outcome.value: A set of clear poll options is created.

nodes.task_description: Post the poll to Twitter or another suitable platform.

expected_outcome.value: The poll is live and collecting responses.

nodes.task_description: After the poll closes, share the results and a link to a related article.

expected_outcome.value: The engagement loop is closed by sharing the results.
